# AICon — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> AICon is an AI-focused conference event. The brand centers around artificial intelligence, technology, and innovation, bringing together professionals and enthusiasts in the AI space for a dedicated conference experience.

---

## Pages

### בית
https://example.com
הצטרפו לכנס הבינה המלאכותית המוביל של השנה. AICon מפגיש מומחים, חדשנות וטכנולוגיות פורצות דרך. גלו מגמות חמות, התחברו למובילי תעשייה והיו חלק מהמהפכה. כרטיסים במבצע לזמן מוגבל!

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

### Terms & Conditions
https://example.com/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

### Accessibility Statement
https://example.com/accessibility
Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.

---

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel, required)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About AICon
AICon is an AI-focused conference event. The brand centers around artificial intelligence, technology, and innovation, bringing together professionals and enthusiasts in the AI space for a dedicated conference experience.

## Target Audience
- חוקרי AI
- יזמי סטארטאפים טכנולוגיים
- מקצועני IT

## Industry
Technology Conference

---

# Machine-readable feeds

- Sitemap (XML): https://example.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
